header.subtitle: AI Product Engineer | Prompt Engineer | Multi-Agent Systems | Fintech

professionalSummary: AI Product Engineer with 8+ years of experience building real-world products across mobile, frontend, and backend systems. Specialized in prompt engineering, multi-agent orchestration, and AI-powered product execution. Strong fintech background integrating payment systems and handling transactional flows in production. Focused on turning AI capabilities into scalable, reliable, and production-ready systems.

experience.description: Led development of mobile applications handling real transactional flows (checkout, delivery, validation). Applied AI-assisted workflows to accelerate development, refactoring, and feature delivery. Improved onboarding performance and reduced friction in critical flows. Increased reliability through better error handling and system design.

Developed mobile applications for data-driven operational systems. Worked with real-world execution workflows and performance-critical features. Used AI tools for code generation, refactoring, documentation, and faster iteration cycles. Focused on scalability, performance, and production reliability.

Led development of a scalable platform with strong product orientation. Designed and implemented features for sales, learning, and growth. Applied AI-assisted workflows to modularize systems, accelerate execution, and generate documentation. Contributed to product and technical decision-making.

Owned and maintained payment and risk flows in a fintech environment. Implemented transaction validation logic and financial systems. Refactored critical modules aligned with evolving payment requirements. Focused on reliability and edge-case handling in financial products.
